sections.heading: ERA Calculator | Free Earned Run Average Calculator for Baseball & Softball
sections.content: Free ERA calculator (Earned Run Average) for baseball and softball pitchers. Calculate ERA with 9-inning or 7-inning formulas. Includes MLB ERA standards, xERA explanation, and Japanese era converter.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the ERA Calculator | Free Earned Run Average Calculator for Baseball & Softball do?
faq.answer: Free ERA calculator (Earned Run Average) for baseball and softball pitchers. Calculate ERA with 9-inning or 7-inning formulas. Includes MLB ERA standards, xERA explanation, and Japanese era converter.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
